Localization.Description: Password bruteforcing for PostgreSQL accounts. If successful, data stored in the database may be compromised.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Successful password bruteforcing from host {src.host} for PostgreSQL account {subject.application.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Number of failed login attempts: {count.subevents}.
Password bruteforcing attempts from host {src.host} for PostgreSQL account {subject.application.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Number of login attempts: {count.subevents}.
